{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Patriarch
| aliases = Patriarch
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Patriarch
| affiliations = Jai clan
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Jai Daishou]], known as the [[Jai]] Patriarch, is the leader of the [[Jai clan]], which is ranked third among the three great clans. An [[Underlord]] and a legendary figure, he is credited with transforming his clan from a minor wilderness faction into an [[Imperial]] power. He follows the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] and is characterized by a strict adherence to propriety, order, and tradition. As an [[Underlord]], he possesses significant power, though he is currently in the final stages of his [[life]], with an estimated remaining lifespan of only a few years. His leadership is vital to the clan's stability, as it is believed that the [[Jai]] would collapse if he were unseated. Despite his advanced age and physical ailments, such as an aching back, he remains a formidable [[sacred artist]] capable of using his power to punish insolence or suppress others through compulsion.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai Patriarch]] banished [[Jai Long]] to the Wilds.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Jai Patriarch]] is the target of [[Jai Long]]'s crusade.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Jai clan]] has a Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Jai Patriarch]] is a character who exited a [[labyrinth]] with a prize.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Patriarch of the [[Wei clan]] spreads commands throughout [[Wei territory]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] nudged the Patriarch with his toe.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
